description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a dark, multi-faceted hip roof and a spacious, well-maintained yard enclosed by a low brick wall. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a glass awning, flanked by large windows and a small porch area. To the left, there is an attached single-car garage with a driveway leading to a metal gate. The landscaping includes several trees, shrubs, and neatly trimmed grass, with paved walkways connecting the entry and garage. The rear and side elevations display a mix of window sizes, some with decorative shutters and climbing greenery. The overall design is symmetrical and orderly, with a blend of traditional and modern suburban architectural elements.
description: A two-story brick house with a dark hip roof, attached garage, and landscaped yard enclosed by a brick wall. Features a prominent entryway, large windows, and paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a glass awning, attached garage, metal gate, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the paved driveway, side windows, and additional greenery along the house perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, multiple windows, and a more private, enclosed yard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garage extension, rear windows, and the continuation of the paved driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with glass awning, small porch, steps, and flanking windows
